programme.title: Ishqiya
programme.desc: Khalujaan and Babban, two thugs, are on the run from their boss. They seek refuge at an old friend's house but meet Krishna, his widow, instead. Both of them fall for her, oblivious to the fact that Krishna is manipulating them for her own gain.

programme.title: Veerey Ki Wedding
programme.desc: Veerey and Geet fall in love and decide to get married. Their plan gets tossed out of the window when her peace-loving father sees Veerey getting involved in a fight, if only to protect a girl, and stamps him as a violent roadside Romeo.

programme.title: Bollywood Movie
programme.desc: The Movie Club provides Bollywood films, popular Indian movies, and general entertainment programming.
